betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Reformate Gas§f

§aThe rarest vacuum refinery output — a gaseous key to HPS, saturnite, and end-game welding!§f

Reformate Gas is the least common of the four Vacuum Refinery products, obtained when processing §bDesulfurized Crude Oil§f instead of regular crude oil. It provides §e10.5 MTU§f and §e15.7 MHE§f per bucket — making it an excellent fuel — but its real value lies in crafting end-game materials.

§6Production§f:
§b• Vacuum Refinery§f (Desulfurized Crude Oil @ 2 PU): §e150mB§f per §e1,000mB§f.
§b• Catalytic Reformer§f: From Light Oil, Cracked Light Oil, Coker Naphtha, Petroleum Gas, or Cholesterol Solution.
§b• Fractioning Tower§f (Vacuum Light Oil): §e100mB§f → §e70mB§f Kerosene + §e30mB§f Reformate Gas.
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f: Crack Heavy Heating Oil or Reformate.
§b• Pyrolysis Oven§f: §e4,000mB§f Coker Gas → §e100mB§f Reformate Gas.

§6Uses§f:
§b• High-Performance Solvent§f: §e750mB§f Reformate Gas + §e250mB§f Chlorine Gas → §e1,000mB§f HPS.
§b• Mustard Gas§f: §e750mB§f Reformate Gas + §e250mB§f Chlorine Gas + Sulfur → §e1,000mB§f.
§b• Arc Welder§f:
  §b– §e1,000mB§f → Weld Cast Combine Steel Plates.
  §b– §e16,000mB§f → Weld Cast Osmiridium Plates.
§b• Rotary Furnace§f: §e250mB§f → Alloy steel powders into ingots.
§b• Industrial Solidification§f: §e170mB§f → §e1×§f Solid Fuel.

§eTip§f: Reformate Gas is consumed in massive quantities for §bOsmiridium§f welding (§e16,000mB§f per plate). Build a dedicated reformate gas production line with multiple Vacuum Refineries running on desulfurized crude oil, and pipe the output directly into storage tanks!
